creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: The timeout for this PR is short (IIRC 2 weeks), so let me remove the dependency on bug 282450. This update can probably be committed fairly earlier than taking over the maintainership of the port proposed in pending bug 282450. If it's true, then please use the first upgrade patch with was accidentally obsoleted by BugMaster.
